headline: Laia keeps the board warm while you are away.
subheadline: Dense editorial view of inbox, engagements, routines, home chores, and live operating context.

modules.title: Inbox needing attention
modules.summary: No new non-spam email at the latest check.

modules.title: Engagement map
modules.summary: Current company work arranged by motion, follow-up, and blockers.

cards.title: Color Farm / Dharma
cards.body: Platform/app setup, access coordination, recordings, and implementation motion.

cards.title: ForwardFooding
cards.body: Data Navigator 2.0 cleanup, taxonomy, imports, demos, and data structure work.

cards.title: ZenHammer
cards.body: Payment workflow work around NMI / SwipeSum, onboarding, and KYC concerns.

cards.title: Monostate
cards.body: Recurring planning / sprint-style engagement and currently active work.

cards.body: Avatar / virtual assistant estimation and proposal-stage conversations.

cards.title: Uanaknow / Sagastume
cards.body: Waiting on the next Uanaknow job, now focused on Sagastume.

cards.title: Yurbban
cards.body: Pending follow-up on their side; not waiting on Brian to move it right now.

modules.title: Home chores
modules.summary: Persistent household list; can be updated from chat.

modules.title: Internal projects
modules.summary: Persistent list of internal products we are building together.

modules.title: Agent routine
modules.summary: Weekday watcher cadence at :00 and :30 from 09:00 through 18:00.

cards.title: Step 1
cards.body: Poll Gmail via read-only OAuth; do not send, label, archive, or modify anything.

cards.title: Step 2
cards.body: Compare recent mail against Hermes last-seen state, not unread status.

cards.title: Step 3
cards.body: Filter obvious noise and spam-like patterns before surfacing anything.

cards.title: Step 4
cards.body: Separate likely replies from FYI mail and draft a useful suggested response.

cards.title: Step 5
cards.body: Notify only when something relevant exists.

cards.title: Step 6
cards.body: Refresh this dashboard so the website stays aligned with the latest watcher state.

modules.title: Agent operating rules
modules.summary: What the agent can do, what it will not do, and how the dashboard stays in sync.

cards.title: Automation safety
cards.body: No email auto-replies or mailbox mutations are enabled.

cards.title: Sync policy
cards.body: When work changes dashboard-relevant state, the website should update too.
